## What

One sentence. Active voice. Name the artifact.

## Why

One sentence. The leverage gained or the cost of not shipping.

## House voice

- [ ] Banned-word list enforced (`leverage / utilize / robust / streamline / elevate / unlock / empower / seamlessly / cutting-edge / synergy / comprehensive / delve / tapestry`)
- [ ] One italic accent per paragraph maximum
- [ ] First-name sign-offs only
- [ ] Run through `noise-cancel` discipline

## Brand system

- [ ] Tokens from `design/CLAUDE_DESIGN_BRIEF.md` only
- [ ] Type pairing from section 7 only
- [ ] No external CSS framework dependencies
- [ ] Mobile-first responsive checked at 375 / 768 / 1280
